---
title: "Fixture — a spec with no watcher/self-heal declaration (OUT OF SCOPE for Standard B)"
---

# Fixture spec — a one-shot conversational feature, no recurring watcher

This adds a single reply path. It declares no self-heal anchor field, so the field
schema does not bind it (§353-355 — a one-shot reply is not a watcher and pays no
self-heal cost).
